title: 10 Rules a Man of God Sets for His Phone
caption:
This is your generation's battle — and most men are losing it without realizing they entered.

The phone isn't neutral. It's the room where lust lives, where envy lives, where comparison and distraction bleed your hours dry. If you can't put it down, something other than Christ owns you.

So set the rules now — before you're tired, before the craving peaks, before the habit cements itself another year.

Ten rules. You probably won't keep all of them this week. Start with three. But write them down before you swipe out of this post.

Save this. Print it out if you have to.

#faith #christianmen #discipline #godlymen #manofgod #phonefreedom #christianity #selfcontrol #scripture
